commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Barachias adopted him, (1 Esdras v. 1.) or rather Addo was his grandfather.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: ZACHARIAS began to prophesy in the same year as Aggeus, and upon the same occasion. His prophecy is full of mysterious figures and promises of blessings, partly relating to the synagogue, and partly to the church of Christ.
